case_title: NORTH STAR CAPITAL ACQ LLC VS. SYLVIA PERKINS

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 302, SYLVIA PERKIN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO CARRY HER BURDEN OF PROOF TO SHOW THAT THE MONEY BEING HELD BY THE SHERIFF IS EXEMPT. SEE CCP 703.580(B). THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THEREAFTER $100 PER PAY PERIOD FOR PAYMENT ON ACCOUNT OF THE DEBT TO BE GARNISHED FROM WAGES. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976 (302)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SYLVIA PERKINS, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Sylvia Perkin's Claim Of Exemption is denied. Defendant failed to carry her burden of proof to show that the money being held by the sheriff is exempt. See CCP 703.580(b). The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment, and thereafter $100 per pay period for payment on account of the debt to be garnished from wages. Order signed after hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
